metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for Overthink — directed sequential diversity ideation for Claude Code.

plugins.name: overthink
plugins.description: Directed sequential diversity ideation — N problem-specific axes, one idea per axis forced away from all prior ideas, each tagged trap/gem/solid. Plus --deep (recursive autonomous cascade down every concretization layer) and --full (framing round + cascade + synthesis of the goal-appropriate finished deliverable).
